name: OANDA
description_short: Trusted forex broker with competitive spreads, advanced trading tools, and no minimum deposit requirement.
description_long:
OANDA is one of the most established and trusted forex brokers, operating since 1996 and regulated in multiple major jurisdictions. The broker is known for competitive spreads, transparent pricing, and a commitment to providing fair execution for retail and professional traders alike.

OANDA offers two pricing models: the Standard account with spreads starting from 1.1 pips on EUR/USD and no commissions, and the Core Pricing account with raw spreads from 0.1 pips plus a $5 per side per 100K commission. The Core account requires a $10,000 minimum deposit but delivers significantly better pricing for active traders.

The broker supports MetaTrader 4, TradingView integration, and its own proprietary OANDA Trade platform. With no minimum deposit on standard accounts and support for micro-lot (1,000 unit) trading, OANDA is accessible for traders of all sizes while providing the depth needed for institutional-level trading.
pros: No minimum deposit on Standard account
Micro-lot trading for precise position sizing
cons: Standard account spreads are above average
Product range limited compared to multi-asset brokers
No crypto trading in most regions
founder: Dr. Michael Stumm and Dr. Richard Olsen
company_background: Co-founded with the belief that Internet and technology would open up currency markets. Now a globally recognized award-winning broker offering forex trading, CFDs, cryptocurrency, and currency data services for over 25 years.
scraped_features: 68+ major and minor forex currency pairs
API access to automate trading strategies
Margin rates from 2% on EUR/USD and 3% on AUD/USD
Elite Trader program with volume-based rebates and exclusive TradingView discounts
MarketPulse daily trading news from award-winning analysts
Mobile and tablet apps with advanced charting tools
Historical currency converter with 30+ years of data across 38,000+ FX pairs
Exchange rates API for corporate clients
Welcome bonus offer for new clients
unique_selling_points: 25+ years of established FX trading experience
TradingView 2024 Award: Best Forex Broker in AMER
Elite Trader program offering personalized relationship managers and premium tools
Trusted by major corporations for currency data (38,000+ FX pairs)
Comprehensive API for corporate FX solutions and retail automation
